container_types.name: 8-foot Mini Container
container_types.description: Compact steel portable container ideal for studio apartments, dorm rooms, or partial moves. Fits in tight driveways and urban parking spaces.

container_types.name: 12-foot City Container
container_types.description: Medium portable container designed for city streets and alleys, suitable for most 1-bedroom apartments.

container_types.name: 16-foot Family Container
container_types.description: Our most popular size for 2–3 bedroom homes. Provides ample room for furniture, appliances, and boxes.

container_types.name: 20-foot Large Home Container
container_types.description: Largest all-purpose container for 3–4 bedroom homes or offices with bulky furniture.

container_types.name: 12-foot Driveway-Narrow Container
container_types.description: Narrow footprint container engineered for tight driveways, townhomes, and urban alleys while still fitting up to a 1–2 bedroom space.

container_types.name: 8-foot Storage Value Container
container_types.description: Budget-friendly container optimized for short-term or seasonal storage rather than whole-home moves.

help_articles.title: Cancellation & refund policy
help_articles.content:
Overview
Our goal is to provide flexible scheduling while ensuring our crews and containers are available when you need them. This policy explains how cancellations, reschedules, and refunds work for local and long-distance moves, as well as storage-only bookings.

Local move cancellations
You can cancel a local move at any time, but fees may apply depending on how close you are to your scheduled service date.

Cancelling more than 7 days before your local move
- No cancellation fee.
- Your reservation deposit (if collected) is fully refundable to your original payment method.

Cancelling 3–7 days before your local move
- A reduced late-cancellation fee may apply.
- Your reservation deposit is refundable minus any applicable late-cancellation fee.

Cancelling a local move 3 days before the scheduled date
If you cancel a local move 3 days (72 hours) before your scheduled container delivery or pickup:
- A $50 late-cancellation fee is typically charged per reservation.
- Any prepaid move or storage charges are refunded in full.
- The original reservation deposit is refunded minus the $50 late-cancellation fee.

Same-day and day-before cancellations
- Cancelling within 24 hours of the scheduled arrival window may result in a fee equal to one day's container rental or a minimum of $75, whichever is higher.
- Dispatched containers that arrive on-site are considered a service visit even if you choose not to use them.

Long-distance move cancellations
- Long-distance moves cancelled 8 or more days before the first service date are fully refundable.
- Moves cancelled 3–7 days before the first service date may incur a reduced linehaul or routing fee.
- Moves cancelled within 72 hours of the first service date may forfeit the transport portion of the move while storage or protection plan fees may be refundable.

Storage-only reservations
- Monthly storage fees are prorated on move-in but not typically prorated on move-out.
- Cancelling before your first container is delivered generally results in a full refund of storage charges.

Rescheduling instead of cancelling
In many cases, you can reschedule your service date instead of cancelling outright.
- Rescheduling more than 3 days before your service date is usually free.
- Rescheduling within 3 days of service may incur a change-fee that is lower than the cancellation fee.

How refunds are issued
- Refunds are processed back to the original payment method within 5–10 business days.
- If your card has expired, your bank may reroute funds to your new card automatically.

Contacting us about a cancellation
If you are unsure whether a fee will apply to your situation, please contact our support team via phone, email, or live chat. Have your reservation or quote number ready so we can review the exact terms on your account.

help_articles.title: How moving quotes work
help_articles.content: This article explains the steps to get a quote for local and long-distance moves, what information we need, and how pricing is calculated based on container type, distance, delivery windows, and optional services such as packing supplies and protection plans.

help_articles.title: Portable storage containers overview
help_articles.content: Learn how portable storage works, including delivery, loading time, on-site storage, and return pickup. This guide covers standard versus expedited delivery, common rental durations (such as 30-day bookings), and how monthly storage fees are calculated by container type.

help_articles.title: Using the space calculator
help_articles.content: Our space calculator estimates how many containers or how much storage space you need based on your home size and the furniture and boxes you select. Choose a home type (for example, 2-bedroom apartment), add rooms such as Bedroom 1 or Storage closet, and adjust quantities for beds, dressers, and boxes. The tool will recommend one or more container counts; you can reserve the smallest recommendation that still meets your needs.

help_articles.title: Choosing packing supplies
help_articles.content: This guide explains the differences between moving kits, box bundles, and accessories such as tape, bubble wrap, and furniture pads. It also shows how to sort supplies by price and add them to your move during the quote process.

help_articles.title: Promo codes and discounts
help_articles.content: Learn where to find current deals & promotions, how to identify offers for new customers, and how to apply a promo code to a move quote or storage reservation before checkout.

help_articles.title: Account and billing FAQ
help_articles.content: Answers to common questions about viewing invoices, updating payment methods, and understanding recurring storage charges.

help_articles.title: Contacting support
help_articles.content: Learn how to reach our support team by phone, email, or live chat from the Contact us page or the Help center.

packing_supply_products.name: 1-Bedroom Starter Kit
packing_supply_products.description: Includes 10 small boxes, 8 medium boxes, 2 large boxes, 1 roll of tape, and 1 marker. Ideal for a small 1-bedroom apartment or studio.

packing_supply_products.name: 2-Bedroom Essentials Kit
packing_supply_products.description: 20 small boxes, 15 medium boxes, 5 large boxes, 2 rolls of tape, and 2 markers. Recommended for most 2-bedroom apartments.

packing_supply_products.name: Kitchen Packing Kit
packing_supply_products.description: Assortment of dish packs, glass dividers, and bubble wrap to protect fragile kitchen items.

packing_supply_products.name: Small Boxes (20 pack)
packing_supply_products.description: 20 durable small moving boxes for books, canned goods, and other heavy items.

packing_supply_products.name: Medium Boxes (15 pack)
packing_supply_products.description: 15 medium moving boxes suitable for kitchen items, decor, and toys.

packing_supply_products.name: Large Boxes (10 pack)
packing_supply_products.description: 10 large moving boxes for bedding, pillows, and bulky but light items.

packing_supply_products.name: Wardrobe Boxes (3 pack)
packing_supply_products.description: 3 tall wardrobe boxes with hanging bars to move clothing without folding.

packing_supply_products.name: Packing Tape (6 pack)
packing_supply_products.description: Six rolls of heavy-duty clear packing tape with easy-tear dispensers.

packing_supply_products.name: Bubble Wrap (2 large rolls)
packing_supply_products.description: Two large rolls of perforated bubble wrap for fragile items.

packing_supply_products.name: Queen Mattress Cover
packing_supply_products.description: Plastic mattress bag to protect a queen-size mattress from dust and moisture.

packing_supply_products.name: Furniture Pads (12 pack)
packing_supply_products.description: Reusable quilted pads to protect furniture during moves or storage.

packing_supply_products.name: Heavy-Duty Stretch Wrap
packing_supply_products.description: 1,000 ft roll of stretch wrap for bundling items and protecting furniture.

promotions.name: New customer 15% off your first move
promotions.description: New customers save 15% on their first local or long-distance move when booking online.

promotions.name: Spring storage savings - $50 off
promotions.description: Get $50 off your first month of portable storage when you book a 30-day or longer reservation.

promotions.name: Weekday move 10% off
promotions.description: Save 10% on moves starting Monday–Thursday. Discount applies to move fees only.

promotions.name: 5% off long-distance moves
promotions.description: Take 5% off the transportation portion of qualifying long-distance moves.

promotions.name: New customer $100 off combo move & storage
promotions.description: New customers receive $100 off when booking a move plus at least one month of storage on the same order.

promotions.name: Summer 2025 move sale (expired)
promotions.description: Legacy promotion for 2025 summer bookings. No longer available.

promotions.name: Fall 2026 early booking special
promotions.description: Book your fall 2026 move early and save with this upcoming promotion.

promotions.name: Loyalty storage discount
promotions.description: Existing customers with 6+ months of storage get 10% off their next month.

protection_plans.name: No protection
protection_plans.description: You decline optional protection. You are responsible for any loss or damage beyond what is required by law.

protection_plans.name: Basic protection
protection_plans.description: Entry-level coverage that provides limited protection for your belongings up to a modest per-container limit.

protection_plans.name: Standard coverage
protection_plans.description: Recommended option for most moves. Provides balanced coverage with higher limits for loss or damage per container.

protection_plans.name: Premium protection
protection_plans.description: Our highest level of protection with the most generous per-container limits and coverage for a wider range of incidents.

protection_plans.name: Student basic coverage
protection_plans.description: Discounted basic protection designed for student moves and short-term storage.

support_contact_options.details: Call us at (844) 555-0160 for questions about moves, storage, or billing.

support_contact_options.label: Live chat
support_contact_options.details: Chat with a move & storage specialist in real time. Available daily 7:00am–10:00pm local time.

support_contact_options.details: Send us an email at support@examplemoves.com and we’ll respond within one business day.

support_contact_options.label: After-hours voicemail
support_contact_options.details: Leave a voicemail after hours at (844) 555-0199 and we’ll return your call the next morning.
